meaning: New York Stock Exchange 纽约证券交易所
examples: Fama carried out similar tests for 30 randomly selected firms quoted on the NYSE.
NASDAQ's share of trading in NYSE-listed stocks has risen to over 15%.
The price of NYSE seats and Archipelago shares surged after the announcement of the intended merger.
On Wednesday, Guidewire Software (NYSE:GWRE) became the first tech company to come public in 2012.
